ddls:
CREATE TABLE "door_designs" (
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each door design */,
  "door_design_name" TEXT /* Name of the door design (e.g., atherton, arlington) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the door design */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the door design image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the door design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the door design was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("door_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height */,
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the door design the height belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the door (e.g., 6'7", 6'11") */,
  "min_threshold" REAL /* Minimum threshold for the height (in inches) */,
  "max_threshold" REAL /* Maximum threshold for the height (in inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heights_door_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("door_design_id") REFERENCES door_designs ("door_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_configurations" (
  "panel_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each panel configuration */,
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the door design the panel configuration belongs to */,
  "num_panels" TEXT /* Number of panels (e.g., two, three) */,
  "panel_style" TEXT /* Style of the panels (e.g., raised, flat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_configurations_door_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("door_design_id") REFERENCES door_designs ("door_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thicknesses" (
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thickness */,
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the door design the thickness belongs to */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the door (e.g., 1-3/8") */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the door (e.g., steel, wood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thickness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thicknesses_door_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("door_design_id") REFERENCES door_designs ("door_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widths" (
  "width_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each width */,
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the door design the width belongs to */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the door (e.g., 2'0", 2'4") */,
  "num_doors" TEXT /* Number of doors (e.g., 2 doors, 4 doors) */,
  "min_threshold" REAL /* Minimum threshold for the width (in inches) */,
  "max_threshold" REAL /* Maximum threshold for the width (in inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("width_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widths_door_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("door_design_id") REFERENCES door_designs ("door_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "door_design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the door design the product belongs to */,
  "height_id" INTEGER /* ID of the height the product belongs to */,
  "panel_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel configuration the product belongs to */,
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thickness the product belongs to */,
  "width_id" INTEGER /* ID of the width the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_height_id FOREIGN KEY ("height_id") REFERENCES heights ("height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_width_id FOREIGN KEY ("width_id") REFERENCES widths ("width_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_thickness_id FOREIGN KEY ("thickness_id") REFERENCES thicknesses ("thickness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_door_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("door_design_id") REFERENCES door_designs ("door_design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_panel_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_config_id") REFERENCES panel_configurations ("panel_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, sales representative, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who has the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status history */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
